name: Log4Shell
description: Apache Log4j2 JNDI injection remote code execution. Affects Log4j 2.0-beta9 through 2.14.1. One of the most critical vulnerabilities ever discovered.
remediation: Upgrade to Log4j 2.16.0+, set log4j2.formatMsgNoLookups=true

name: ProxyLogon
description: Microsoft Exchange Server pre-authentication SSRF vulnerability allowing RCE without credentials.
remediation: Apply Microsoft Security Update KB5000871

name: PrintNightmare
description: Windows Print Spooler remote code execution and local privilege escalation.
remediation: Apply Microsoft patch MS-MSRC-2021-34527, disable Print Spooler where not needed

name: Follina (MSDT)
description: Microsoft Windows Support Diagnostic Tool code execution via URI scheme in Office documents.
remediation: Disable MSDT URL Protocol, apply CVE-2022-30190 patch

name: HTTP/2 Rapid Reset
description: HTTP/2 protocol zero-day enabling record-breaking DDoS attacks exceeding 398 million requests/sec.
remediation: Apply vendor patches, configure HTTP/2 stream limits

name: Outlook NTLM Leak
description: Microsoft Outlook zero-click NTLM hash leak via specially crafted email. No user interaction required.
remediation: Apply March 2023 Patch Tuesday updates, block outbound SMB

name: PAN-OS Command Injection
description: Command injection in Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS GlobalProtect feature. Unauthenticated RCE.
remediation: Apply PAN-SA-2024-0006, disable GlobalProtect telemetry

name: Zerologon
description: Netlogon privilege escalation allowing unauthenticated domain controller takeover via cryptographic flaw.
remediation: Apply August 2020 Windows Update, enforce secure Netlogon

name: VMware vCenter RCE
description: Remote code execution in VMware vCenter Server via vSphere Client plugin without authentication.
remediation: Apply VMSA-2021-0010 patch immediately

name: Confluence OGNL Injection
description: Unauthenticated remote code execution via OGNL injection in Atlassian Confluence.
affected_products: Atlassian Confluence Server and Data Center

name: GoAnywhere MFT RCE
description: Pre-authentication command injection in Fortra GoAnywhere MFT administrative interface.
remediation: Apply 7.1.2 patch, restrict admin portal network access

name: MOVEit Transfer SQL Injection
description: SQL injection in Progress MOVEit Transfer exploited massively by Cl0p ransomware group.
remediation: Apply vendor patches, review access logs for IOCs

name: MSHTML ActiveX Zero-Day
description: Microsoft MSHTML remote code execution via specially crafted Office documents exploiting ActiveX.
remediation: Apply September 2021 Patch Tuesday, disable ActiveX

name: ProxyNotShell
description: Microsoft Exchange Server RCE requiring authentication, chained with CVE-2022-41040 SSRF.
remediation: Apply November 2022 Exchange SU, enable AMSI integration

name: Cisco ASA SSL VPN Zero-Day
description: Unauthorized brute force of Cisco ASA/FTD VPN credentials without authentication checks.
remediation: Apply Cisco security advisory updates, enforce MFA

name: Fortinet FortiOS SSL VPN
description: Out-of-bounds write in FortiOS SSL VPN enabling unauthenticated RCE via specially crafted HTTP requests.
remediation: Upgrade to patched versions, disable SSL VPN if not needed

name: F5 BIG-IP iControl REST RCE
description: Unauthenticated RCE via iControl REST interface in F5 BIG-IP. No authentication required.
remediation: Apply F5 Security Advisory K03009991, restrict management access

name: Dirty Pipe
description: Linux kernel pipe privilege escalation enabling unprivileged users to write to arbitrary read-only files.
remediation: Update Linux kernel to 5.16.11, 5.15.25, or 5.10.102+

name: Sudo Baron Samedit
description: Heap-based buffer overflow in sudo allowing any local user to gain root privileges.
remediation: Upgrade sudo to 1.9.5p2 or later immediately

name: Spring4Shell
description: RCE vulnerability in Spring Framework via data binding on JDK 9+ allowing code execution.
remediation: Upgrade to Spring Framework 5.3.18 or 5.2.20+

name: Citrix Bleed
description: Session token disclosure in Citrix NetScaler ADC and Gateway enabling session hijacking without credentials.
remediation: Apply CTX579459 patches, invalidate all active sessions

name: Fortinet EMS SQL Injection
description: SQL injection in Fortinet FortiClientEMS allowing unauthenticated RCE as SYSTEM.
remediation: Upgrade to 7.2.3 or 7.0.11 and later

name: regreSSHion OpenSSH RCE
description: Signal handler race condition in OpenSSH sshd allowing unauthenticated RCE as root on glibc Linux.
remediation: Upgrade to OpenSSH 9.8p1, set LoginGraceTime=0 as mitigation

name: Outlook Moniker Link RCE
description: Microsoft Outlook RCE via specially crafted hyperlinks bypassing Protected View, enabling NTLM credential theft.
remediation: Apply February 2024 Patch Tuesday updates

name: TeamCity Auth Bypass
description: Authentication bypass in JetBrains TeamCity CI/CD server allowing RCE without credentials.
remediation: Upgrade to 2023.05.4 or apply security patch plugin
